A great app in general, but so much stuff in there that I don't need and it's simply not possible to deactivate them -I don't need streaks -I don't need all these animations -I don't want meal tips I just want a functional app to track everything with as minimal time necessary to do so. Use this for tracking walking, it is easy to use and was accurate, but no longer. I still love the app design and associated website. However the accuracy seems to have gone to pot recently. So I am now using another app which seems to give much more consistent and reliable results.

Has been super helpful for me to lose weight! I've been using it since 2015 and it has probably saved me so much money that I could've spent on a gym. it won't save any favorites anymore.  everytime I open the app it says it crashes. if they get the crash fixed I will give it more stars. aside from that is a very good app for keeping track of carbs fat and protein

Generally enjoyable, but the captias sometimes break & refuse to work as intended, & at times has replaced my alarm with a different significantly more irritating one. according to others, the alarm is absurdly loud & can be heard from outside the building no matter how low I set the volume.

Works well. Keeps accurate distance on the phones I've used it with. Had the premium for a while. I'm broke so I got rid of it but I loved it. Voice coach was especially cool Bought premium again and now it crashes on startup. Using Pixel 4 and can't even open the app
Great app if it was not a greedy money hungry app wanting to make you pay just to listen to sounds. Just use U-Tube instead, its free. I can see to pay to listen. to podcast but not just noise.

Thr UI is nice, and it's easy to book a session. The integration (or lack thereof) of Zoom for video conferencing needs to be optimized. Still ok, but all the tracking of how much weight went haywire. see how it goes, but probably back to own and paper, again...

Great for setting a plan that is flexible and easy to follow. The only thing I dislike is that when running sprints it won't tell you that you've reached the distance it wanted you to go so you have to keep checking the app while you sprint. false_negatives.text: Confusing at checkout ,,, looks like only Paypal is accepted. Took me 3 times to figure out and had to come back twice before accepted. Time wasting!!

Got a Garmin watch because it's listed as officially supported by Sleep as Android. But the Sleep app for Garmin is completely broken and unusable. Therefore money wasted on both a watch and premium subscription for the app.

Good product, bad customer service. I was on the fence about buying Whoop due to reported connectivity issues but I've had no issues at all. Dont know who did this update. No account info. Trouble logging in. Seems more like logging in on webpage with less info. Slower. Got email saying I left something in cart but cart shows empty.

Product details and descriptions are not formatted properly for a mobile screen. You have to scroll horizontally in order to read the entire entry. There also is no option to expand product images, to my knowledge.
